case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. DAVID LECOUNTE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LECOUNTE, DAVID DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-07-2011
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-27-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
